verses.commentary: You then, my son personalizes the exhortation. Be strong in the grace that is in Christ Jesus locates strength's source: not willpower but grace. Strength comes through union with Christ, not self-effort.

And the things you have heard me say in the presence of many witnesses establishes public, verified teaching. Entrust to reliable people creates succession plan. Who will also be qualified to teach others extends the chain to fourth generation: Paul to Timothy to reliable people to others. Multiplication through faithful transmission.

Join with me in suffering invites shared hardship. Like a good soldier of Christ Jesus introduces first of three metaphors. Soldiers expect suffering; so should Christians. Hardship is normative, not exceptional.

No one serving as a soldier gets entangled in civilian affairs develops military image. But rather tries to please his commanding officer states single focus. Soldiers maintain undivided loyalty. Ministry requires similar focused devotion, avoiding distracting entanglements.

Similarly, anyone who competes as an athlete introduces second metaphor. Does not receive the victor's crown except by competing according to the rules emphasizes proper method. Victory requires following regulations. Faithfulness to gospel parameters matters more than apparent success.

The hardworking farmer should be the first to receive a share of the crops introduces third metaphor. Farmers work before reward; so ministers labor before seeing fruit. Priority in reward goes to those who toil. Effort precedes enjoyment.
Reflect on what I am saying commands meditation. For the Lord will give you insight into all this promises divine illumination. Understanding comes through reflection empowered by the Lord.

Remember Jesus Christ grounds exhortation in Christ. Raised from the dead emphasizes resurrection. Descended from David affirms messianic lineage. This is my gospel identifies Paul's message: the risen, Davidic Christ.

For which I am suffering even to the point of being chained like a criminal connects suffering to gospel. But God's word is not chained contrasts: Paul bound, word free. Imprisonment cannot restrain the message. Physical constraint does not limit spiritual power.

Therefore I endure everything for the sake of the elect draws conclusion. That they too may obtain the salvation that is in Christ Jesus, with eternal glory states purpose. Paul's suffering serves others' salvation. Ministry hardship advances God's purposes for the chosen.

Here is a trustworthy saying introduces creedal formula. If we died with him, we will also live with him states first conditional: union in death guarantees union in life. Death with Christ ensures resurrection with him.

If we endure, we will also reign with him adds second conditional: perseverance leads to reigning. If we disown him, he will also disown us states negative corollary. Apostasy has consequences; denying Christ brings his denial.

If we are faithless, he remains faithful offers comfort. For he cannot disown himself grounds divine faithfulness in God's character. Our faithlessness does not negate his faithfulness. God's nature prevents self-contradiction.

Keep reminding God's people of these things commands repetition. Warn them before God against quarreling about words adds solemn charge. It is of no value, and only ruins those who listen explains rationale. Word-wrangling produces destruction, not edification.

Do your best to present yourself to God as one approved commands diligence toward divine approval. A worker who does not need to be ashamed describes the goal. And who correctly handles the word of truth specifies the skill: accurate interpretation and application of Scripture.

Avoid godless chatter commands separation from empty talk. Because those who indulge in it will become more and more ungodly shows progression. Bad speech produces bad character; trivial talk leads to serious sin.
Their teaching will spread like gangrene uses medical metaphor. Among them are Hymenaeus and Philetus names specific false teachers. Error metastasizes like infection, requiring surgical removal.

Who have departed from the truth describes their apostasy. They say that the resurrection has already taken place specifies their error: over-realized eschatology. And they destroy the faith of some reports casualties. False teaching shipwrecks genuine believers.

Nevertheless, God's solid foundation stands firm provides assurance. Sealed with this inscription introduces two quotations. The Lord knows those who are his affirms divine knowledge. And, Everyone who confesses the name of the Lord must turn away from wickedness adds ethical requirement. God's foundation combines security and holiness.

In a large house there are articles not only of gold and silver, but also of wood and clay extends metaphor. Some are for special purposes and some for common use distinguishes function. The church contains both noble and ignoble vessels.

Those who cleanse themselves from the latter will be instruments for special purposes shows transformation possibility. Made holy, useful to the Master and prepared to do any good work describes outcome. Purification enables noble use.

Flee the evil desires of youth commands escape from youthful passions. And pursue righteousness, faith, love and peace lists positive virtues. Along with those who call on the Lord out of a pure heart adds communal dimension. Fight vice, pursue virtue, do both in community.

Don't have anything to do with foolish and stupid arguments prohibits engagement with worthless disputes. Because you know they produce quarrels states known outcome. Predictable harm justifies avoidance.

And the Lord's servant must not be quarrelsome but must be kind to everyone describes ministerial character. Able to teach adds competency. Not resentful completes the profile. Gentle competence marks God's servant.

Opponents must be gently instructed prescribes method. In the hope that God will grant them repentance leading them to a knowledge of the truth states goal. Repentance is divine gift, not human achievement. Gentle instruction creates space for God to work.

And that they will come to their senses describes awakening. And escape from the trap of the devil, who has taken them captive to do his will reveals current bondage. Opponents are prisoners needing liberation, not merely enemies needing defeat.
